description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16-slim Docker image with a cache on node_modules/. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs npm install --omit=optional --no-audit --ignore-scripts, then npm run lint, npm run build, npm run compress, and moves the dist directory to public. The job publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, sets the production environment with URL https://winni.gitlab.io/$CI_PROJECT_NAME, and only runs on the master branch.
